name: U Golf
address: 1082 Cedar Cross Rd suite 1, Dubuque, IA 52003
about: UGolf Dubuque is a premier indoor golf experience and retail fitting center featuring three identical golf simulator bays equipped with TrackMan 4e technology. The venue combines high-performance golf simulation with professional club fitting and repair services, offering a comprehensive environment for both serious golfers and casual players. UGolf provides a realistic indoor golf experience, combining over 26 separate metrics to create the best overall profile of your swing, supported by expertise as a Golf Magazine Top 50 Club Fitter. The facility offers flexible booking options and distinct seasonal hours, catering to a range of golfing needs from simulation play to equipment customization.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to three bays with the most accurate TrackMan 4e simulators on the market
Expert club fitting services using Trackman data analysis with over 600 shaft options
Comprehensive in-house club repair and customization services
A wide selection of top golf brands and professional-grade equipment
Flexible rental options and clear seasonal pricing structure

food_and_drink.notes: No food service is mentioned. BYOB policy is not specified.
No alcohol service is mentioned. BYOB policy is not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: Three identical bays featuring TrackMan 4e technology, the most accurate, realistic and enjoyable simulated golf system available.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility policy requires you to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answers: The facility does not mention food or drink service, and a BYOB policy is not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is not advertised as kid-friendly, with a maximum party size of 4 people per bay and no specific mention of children's activities.
